item.title: index
item.description: This is going to be a new/updated version of DD4. Considering it’s going to be quite different from DD4, this new version is called EpicArcs.

item.title: Divine Ranks
item.description: Divine Rank Hierarchy (1-9) TierRankDescriptionPower level1Initiate SparkA mortal bearing a nascent divine spark—chosen by fate, prophecy, or divine will.

item.title: DD5 Skill List
item.description: Normal Skills Normal Skills Magical/Faith Skills Magical/Faith Skills Warrior Skills Warrior Skills.

item.title: DD5 Player's Guide
item.description: Ideeën voor DD5 [i] Magisch systeem verder uitwerken.

item.title: 02-05-2025 Saalim
item.description: Avontuur Gesprek met Naji Woord “Orryn” genoemd Naji’s divine naam “Nahrim” Al-Qarram genoemd door Faisal Yaseena is looking for Saalim Appologised to Saalim Gaat met Scheemda praten Bij het maken van de oase voor Naji’s huwelijk steekt Saalim zijn in de grond.

item.title: Saalim's known associates
item.description: Saalim’s Known Associates Transclude of Saalim's-family Tribe.

item.title: Saalim's family
item.description: Saalim’s Family Naji fullname: Naji ibn Mohammed abu Razin Al Medjai Vader van Saheeda, Saalim, Yasra, Nazmi en baby binnenkort Getrouwd met de biologische moeder van Saalim Saheeda dochter van Naji, zus van Saalim Yasra Nazmi Jasmina Biologische moeder van Saalim, zus van de lady Ishtara,.

item.title: Name meaning - Jabari al-Masari
item.description: Meaning of his name: Jabari Language: Swahili Meaning: Brave Significance: Suggests a fearless spirit—a seeker who dares to chart dangerous ley lines and explore hidden magical realms.

item.title: Sakai's Japanese Astrology - Death
item.description: 🕯 Esoteric Turning Reading — Becoming Undead Date of Transformation: Meiji 22, 3rd Month, 12th Day Gregorian Date: April 14, 1889 Sexagenary Pillar: 庚辰 (Kanoe-Tatsu) Moon Phase: Waning Gibbous (~3rd quarter) ⚙️ 1.
